items.title: Kinase interaction analysis predicts actions of the WNK-OSR1/SPAK pathway
items.author: Melanie H. Cobb
items.content: Experimental data-driven kinase interaction predictions expand reach of the WNK-OSR1/SPAK pathway by facilitating the identification of multiple OSR1 and SPAK interaction partners.

items.title: AtCHE1, the Arabidopsis homolog of mammalian AATF/Che-1 protein, is involved in safeguarding genome stability
items.author: Xugang Li
items.content: Identification and characterization of a mutant (designated as che1) derived from an EMS-mutagenized Arabidopsis Col-0 population demonstrates that a homolog of the mammalian Apoptosis Antagonizing Transcription Factor (AATF/Che-1) plays a crucial role in maintaining genome stability.

items.title: AAV-dCas9 vector unsilences paternal Ube3a in neurons by impeding Ube3a-ATS transcription
items.author: Mark J. Zylka
items.content: Snord115-targeted AAV-dCas9 can dose dependently disrupt Ube3a-ATS in the absence of DNA double-strand breaks or a chromatin repression domain, highlighting utility of dCas9 for transcriptional collision-based applications.

items.title: Pre-existing YFV-17D immunity mediates T cell cross-protection against dengue virus serotype 2 infection in mice
items.author: Bobby Brooke Herrera
items.content: Heterologous T cells induced by yellow fever virus 17D immunization confer cross-protection against secondary dengue virus serotype 2 infection.

items.title: Photoinduced chromophore dissociation resulting in aggregation-induced red fluorescence
items.author: Karthik Pushpavanam
items.content: Violet-light exposure of the photocleavable green fluorescent protein PhoCl1 releases a chromophore–peptide fragment that aggregates and emits red fluorescence, revealing a novel mechanism of aggregation-induced emission.

items.title: A-to-I edited SNHG3 promotes non-small cell lung cancer metastasis by promoting fatty acid oxidation and resisting ferroptosis
items.author: Lei Yang
items.content: Adenosine-to-inosine editing in SNHG3 (c.1746 A > I) drives non-small cell lung (NSCLC) cancer metastasis and docetaxel resistance by enhancing SSRP1 binding and altering fatty acid metabolism. Targeting this hyper-edited RNA may improve cancer therapy.

items.title: Therapeutic potential of Desmodium styracifolium polysaccharide in attenuating nano-calcium oxalate induced renal injury and fibrosis
items.author: Xin-Yuan Sun
items.content: Desmodium styracifolium Polysaccharides attenuate nephrolithiasis-induced renal fibrosis by inhibiting CaOx deposition, delaying EMT, and suppressing TGF-β/Smad signaling, highlighting their potential as anti-fibrotic agents.

items.title: Anatomical insights into the superior longitudinal system from integrative in- vivo and ex-vivo mapping
items.author: Silvio Sarubbo
items.content: By integrating in-vivo tractography with ex-vivo dissection, this study maps the subcomponents of the Superior Longitudinal System and classifies them based on their anatomical plausibility, revealing the hierarchical and depth-dependent organization of association fibers of the brain.
